subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God in the Tree of Paradise - God, there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Powerful, the All-Knowing, Who hath ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله فی شجره الفردوس الله لا اله الا هو العزیز المقتدر العلیم الذی قدر
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @power of prayer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment
